mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS remains pinned near the zero lower bound, the persistent low cost of capital continues to support equity valuations relative to bonds, producing a steady positive drift in S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as long as rates stay low.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 0.16 indicates near-zero policy rate
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS level and forward 20d returns falls below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or SPX returns are not significantly positive during ZLB spells (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A UNRATE level above 9% combined with a stabilizing or improving PAYEMS trend signals that labor market deterioration has peaked, triggering a positive repricing of equities as investors anticipate the trough of the business cycle, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE > 9.0 AND PAYEMS 3-month change turns non-negative
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 9.7 signals late-recession labor slack
failure_condition: SPX forward 60d returns are negative or insignificantly positive (p > 0.05) in more than 40% of historical instances where UNRATE > 9% and PAYEMS stabilizes, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in INDPRO signals expanding industrial output and improving corporate earnings prospects, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as the market prices in a recovering production cycle.
failure_condition: Rank IC between INDPRO monthly change and forward 20d SPX returns falls below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST below a critical threshold indicates housing sector distress that historically precedes broader demand contraction, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as recession risk repricing occurs.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST at 581.0 is near historic lows
failure_condition: SPX 60d forward returns are positive in more than 55% of historical instances where HOUST < 600, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A positive month-over-month acceleration in RSAFS combined with low CPIAUCSL inflation indicates real consumer demand strength without inflation-driven erosion, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as short-term earnings expectations improve.
failure_condition: Rank IC between joint RSAFS acceleration and low CPIAUCSL signal versus forward 5d returns falls below 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is near zero and UNRATE simultaneously exceeds 9%, the market interprets the combination as confirmation of sustained accommodative policy through a deep labor slack cycle, producing amplified positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days relative to either signal alone.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS=0.16 and UNRATE=9.7 co-occur in snapshot
regime_hint: deep easing cycle with high unemployment
failure_condition: SPX forward 60d returns during joint trigger periods are not significantly higher than during single-signal-only periods (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: During a post-recession recovery regime, an increase in INDPRO combined with rising PAYEMS reinforces a self-sustaining expansion narrative, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days that exceed the effect of either indicator alone.
failure_condition: Joint-trigger periods show forward 20d returns statistically indistinguishable from unconditional baseline (p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in UNRATE above 0.5 percentage points over a 3-month period signals accelerating labor market deterioration that outpaces monetary offsets, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as earnings downgrades follow.
failure_condition: SPX forward 20d returns are positive in more than 55% of historical trigger instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.
